para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.20; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

para.text: The foundation must be constructed to fully support the machine weight.

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:6px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:4px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

para.text: Refer to the information below for the minimum recommended specifications. Where possible, construct the foundation exceeding these conditions.

list.li: The quality of the foundation is greatly influenced by the geological structure of the installation location. To construct the best possible foundation, consult the designated builder referring to the foundation conditions.

When the axis is moved while the maximum load is placed on the table, change in the foundation surface level must be within 0.005 mm/m. If this condition is satisfied, the machine accuracy can be maintained for a considerable period.
Finish the foundation surface as level as possible for machine installation. This facilitates leveling of the machine and the installation and movement of attached units.
Issues with the foundation may cause vibrations on the machine as well as affect the surrounding area.

para.style: margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:0px;

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;
